blockingIssues.description: Multi-file drop handling always processes files[0] and provides no explicit one-file-at-a-time feedback, so mixed multi-file drops can ignore a valid PDF and miss VAL-DROP-006 behavior.
Password modal is mounted in DropScreen, but encrypted-PDF detection transitions to LOADING where ProcessingScreen renders; modal becomes unreachable and password flow blocks.
DocumentViewer reloads PDFs without onPassword callback support, so encrypted PDFs fail to render in preview after password-gated detection.
Clicking sidebar entity rows does not scroll to first matching highlight, missing required panel-to-document linking behavior.
Group header count chips and required uncertain count behavior are missing/mismatched, violating expected sidebar count semantics.
Page thumbnails are numeric placeholders instead of required 0.2x page previews.
Tooltip unmounts on highlight mouseleave before cursor can reach tooltip, breaking tooltip action-button toggle behavior.
Footer download flow calls redactDocument without onPassword callback, so encrypted PDFs fail in redaction/download stage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the agent-browser requirement to explicitly allow either Skill invocation or direct `agent-browser --session ...` CLI usage, and document canonical command patterns (`open`, `close`, inspect/session usage).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews (app-state-and-styles, preview-viewer-highlights) flagged ambiguity between a 'MUST be invoked' wording and successful direct CLI usage patterns.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen completion criteria so workers must fail/partial when required interaction checks are not reproducible (timeouts or unmet expected behavior), and must report procedure deviations instead of marking fully followed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for drop-screen, preview-viewer-highlights, preview-sidebar-panel, and preview-nav-tooltips-keyboard show skipped/partial procedure steps or unmet interaction checks reported as successful runs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand testing guidance from tests/unit-only phrasing to permit/encourage tests/integration for cross-screen and state-machine features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: end-to-end-integration correctly implemented tests in tests/integration, which conflicts with narrow tests/unit wording in skill instructions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit convention that app-state signal transitions should go through `dispatch(event)` unless a justified exception is documented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: drop-screen review identified direct signal mutation in component code while dispatch-only expectation currently appears only in state.ts comments.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mandatory encrypted-PDF regression checks for any feature that touches detection, preview loading, or download/redaction callbacks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: processing-and-password, preview-viewer-highlights, and download-done-flow each introduced independent encrypted-PDF callback/routing regressions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Per-feature complaints about exact ordering of test-first implementation steps.
Repeated notes that architecture.md was not read in one worker run.
